ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Yogurt, fermented milk or dairy specialty, plain

ingredients_text: YOGURT FLAVOURED COATING (65%) [Sugar, Palm Fat, Whey Powder (Milk), Rice Flour, Yogurt Powder (Milk), Glazing Agents: Gum Arabic, Shellac; Emulsifier: Lecithins (Sunflower)], SWEETENED DRIED CRANBERRIES (35%) (Cranberries, Sugar, Sunflower Oil).
